title: Fosquets de Lithica
description: A cycle of dusk concerts in the labyrinthine amphitheatre of the old s'Hostal sandstone quarries run by Líthica, spanning world music, popular traditions, sacred music, flamenco and contemporary creation. Between 2 July and 10 September 2026 it features names such as Sílvia Pérez Cruz, Le Trio Joubran, Ganavya and Rancapino Chico, in a setting where stone, nature and acoustics are part of the experience.
